valuation.model: CORSA SXI CDTI Colour BLACK Year of manufacture 2005 Top speed mph 0 to 60 MPH 13.5seconds Gearbox MANUAL 5 GEARS Engine & fuel consumption Power 70 BHP Torque 1750 rpm Engine capacity 1248 cc Cylind
valuation.recommendation: Repair costs (up to £2,325) exceed half the car's value. Negotiate hard or avoid.

advisory_costs.item: Tyre(s) worn close to legal limit
advisory_costs.notes: £80-140 per tyre + £10-15 fitting. MOT pass but retest due soon. Replace proactively.
£40-80 per tyre. Monitor — may not need immediate replacement.
£60-150 for pipe + £80-120 labour. Can spread fast. Replace before MOT retest.
£30-60 per hose + £50-80 labour. Replace in pairs.
£30-60 per cable + £50-80 labour. Affects handbrake operation.
£150-600 for welding + £100-400 labour. Structural — MOT fail if serious.
£50-300 for treatment + £50-200 for underseal. Monitor for spread.
£0-30 for bulb/connector. £30-60 for lens unit. MOT fail if affecting light output.
